positive: A vibrant, stylized geometric jungle scene featuring large, symmetrical tropical leaves, ornate stylized toucans, and flowing vines in high contrast silhouette style. The overall composition should be balanced and circular, perfect for a central apparel print. Use a color palette of deep teal, burnt orange, emerald green, and stark white. The style should evoke Art Nouveau meets Pacific Northwest tattoo art, with clean, defined linework and solid color blocking. The layout should be highly symmetrical and visually arresting. Full saturation, highly detailed, graphic design aesthetic, central focus, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, cropped, poorly drawn
